feature: Add Product to Cart and Checkout
story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to select one product, add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Add a product to the cart and verify
steps: Open the NOVA Store homepage
Locate the first product in the product catalogue
Click the Add button on the first product
Verify the cart badge displays 1
Open the cart drawer
Verify the product name in the cart matches the selected product
Verify the product price in the cart matches the selected product price
assertions: Product name in cart should match the selected product
Product price in cart should match the selected product price

cases.title: Complete checkout with Standard Shipping
steps: Open the NOVA Store homepage
Locate the first product in the product catalogue
Click the Add button on the first product
Open the cart drawer
Click the Proceed to Checkout button
Verify the checkout page is displayed
Click the Choose Delivery button
Verify the delivery options are displayed
Select the Standard Shipping option
Verify the Standard Shipping option is highlighted
Click the Continue to Payment button
Verify the payment details section is displayed
Enter the valid card number in the card number field
Enter the cardholder's name in the card name field
Enter the card expiry date in the expiry field
Enter the card CVV in the CVV field
Click the Review Order button
Verify the order review section is displayed
Click the Place Order button
Verify the Order Confirmed! message is displayed
Verify the Continue Shopping button is displayed
assertions: Standard Shipping option should be highlighted
Payment details section should be displayed
Order review section should be displayed
Order Confirmed! message should be displayed
Continue Shopping button should be displayed
